metadata.description: A woman appearing to be in her 40s to 50s has olive skin with some fine lines around the eyes and forehead, and a few small moles on her cheek and chin. Her face is an oval shape with a softly defined jawline. Her hair is medium blonde, straight, and falls to her shoulders with a center part, revealing a slightly receding hairline at the temples. Her almond-shaped eyes are a warm brown, set slightly wide apart, beneath thick, dark, and well-defined eyebrows that arch gently. Her nose is medium-sized with a straight bridge and a rounded tip. Her lips are medium-thick, with a slight upward curve at the corners, revealing a partial smile with visible upper teeth. She has an overall appearance suggesting South Asian heritage, and her head is angled slightly to her right, looking directly at the viewer with a pleasant, closed-mouth smile.
metadata.anchor: woman with warm brown eyes and blonde hair
metadata.action_scenario: riding a bicycle on a sunlit city street, casual clothing, full-body shot, face turned slightly toward the camera
